selector.description: A Home Assistant selector object (entity, device, target, number, text, boolean, ...), left permissive

oneOf.description: A collapsible section grouping several inputs

description: Automation/script blueprint YAML file. Documented at https://www.home-assistant.io/docs/automation/using_blueprints/ and https://www.home-assistant.io/docs/blueprint/selectors/. Only the 'blueprint:' metadata block is modeled strictly; the rest of the document is the automation/script body, which is intentionally left permissive because its shape depends on the arbitrarily complex trigger/condition/action schemas.

input.description: Keyed by input slug, referenced elsewhere in the blueprint as !input <slug>

title: Home Assistant blueprint
